text: To reset your Northwind Cloud password, open the sign in page and choose Forgot password. We email a reset link that stays valid for one hour. Follow it to set a new password.
Pour reinitialiser votre mot de passe Northwind Cloud, ouvrez la page de connexion et cliquez sur Mot de passe oublie. Nous envoyons un lien de reinitialisation valable une heure.

Every Northwind Cloud plan includes a fixed number of seats. Starter includes 3 seats, Team includes 10 seats, Business includes 50 seats, and Enterprise includes 250 seats. Extra seats can be added at any time.
Single sign-on is available on the Business and Enterprise plans. SSO supports SAML and OpenID Connect so your team can sign in with your identity provider. Starter and Team plans do not include SSO.
The Northwind Cloud API is rate limited to 100 requests per minute per workspace. If you exceed the limit the API returns HTTP 429 and a Retry-After header. Batch your calls to stay under the limit.

L API Northwind Cloud est limitee a 100 requetes par minute par espace de travail. Au dela, l API renvoie une erreur HTTP 429 avec un en tete Retry-After. Regroupez vos appels pour rester sous la limite.

Invoices are generated on the first of each month and emailed to the billing contact. You can download past invoices as PDF from Settings, Billing, Invoice history. Payment is charged to the card on file.

You can export your workspace data at any time. Go to Settings, Data, Export and choose CSV or JSON. Large exports are prepared in the background and a download link is emailed when the file is ready.
